title: Claimant sex and preferred title
p: These details will be used to help progress the claim.
preferredTitle: What is the claimant's preferred title? (optional)

preferredTitle.required: Select a list option from the "What is the claimant's preferred title" dropdown
preferredTitle.lengthError: The claimant's preferred title must be a minimum of 2 characters
preferredTitle.numberError: Tell us the claimant's preferred title. This must not include numbers
